LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS BRIAN GRONER AND 36 SECOND STREET PROPERTIES LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF IS TO PLEAD THE AMOUNT ALLEGEDLY DUE AS THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION AND PLEAD SPECIFIC FACTS THAT WOULD PROVIDE A BASIS FOR A FRAUD CLAIM. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS BRIAN GRONER AND 36 SECOND STREET PROPERTIES LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Plaintiff is to plead the amount allegedly due as the 2nd cause of action and plead specific facts that would provide a basis for a fraud claim. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
